sourceTitle: Using AI in university | Current Students – UNSW Sydney
evidenceSnippetOriginal: If you have been found to use AI in a manner that does not meet the course instructions, penalties may occur which would include a fail, a mark of zero for the course, suspension or permanent exclusion.
evidenceLocator: FAQ section 'What are the implications of unauthorised use of AI?'
